label: Gen step
description: Defines a map generation step that runs during world or map generation at the specified execution order.

linkWithSite.label: Link with site
linkWithSite.description: SitePartDef this gen step is linked to. The step only runs when that site part is present.

order.label: Order
order.description: Execution order of this step relative to other gen steps. Lower values run first.

genStep.label: Gen step
genStep.description: The polymorphic gen step object that performs the actual generation work. The Class attribute selects the variant.

preventsGenSteps.label: Prevents gen steps
preventsGenSteps.description: GenStepDefs that this step blocks from running when it is active.
